title: Tunisian Orange Chicken with Citrusy Glaze
description: A flavorful and aromatic chicken dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine, featuring a tangy citrus glaze.

ingredients.name: citrusy glaze (fermented orange peel, stir-fry sauce)

instructions: Season the chicken breast with cumin and coriander.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken until browned, then transfer to a baking sheet.
In the same skillet, cook the onion until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in citrusy glaze and orange juice.
Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer in the glaze for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with orange peel and serve hot.
